Title: Domain Core fixes — invariants and types

Summary:
This change set applies small but important domain improvements requested during STEP 16 validation. It is intended as a focused PR that keeps changes confined to the Domain Core and does not touch infrastructure or persistence.

Changes:
- WatchHistory: enforce `ProgressPercent` invariant (0..100) via setter validation.
- Favorite: add domain helper `ExistsDuplicate` to check duplicate `MovieId` within a local favorites collection.
- Movie: replace `string Status` with typed `MovieStatus` enum to avoid magic strings.

Notes for reviewers:
- All changes are backward-compatible at the persistence boundary only if the persistence layer maps `MovieStatus` appropriately; infrastructure maintainers should update mappings (e.g. column type or conversion) when implementing the repository.
- No EF Core, DB, or infra code modified here.
- Run `dotnet build` to validate compilation.

Checklist:
- [x] Domain-only changes
- [x] Unit-build passes locally
- [ ] Confirm persistence mapping for `MovieStatus` in Infrastructure layer

How to test locally:
1. From repository root run:

```powershell
cd backend
dotnet build
```

2. Review changed files under `backend/FilmFlix.Domain/Entities` and `backend/FilmFlix.Domain/Enums`.

Branch: feature/domain-core-fixes

PR body autogenerated by assistant; please push `feature/domain-core-fixes` branch and open a PR with this description.
